title: Cobblemon Genesis Server Modpack
description: Cobblemon Genesis — a survival-focused modpack built around the official Cobblemon mod. Catch, build, and thrive in an epic Minecraft adventure!
body:
Cobblemon Genesis

Cobblemon Genesis is a survival-focused modpack built to give players a polished, streamlined way to experience Cobblemon in Minecraft. Instead of piecing together mods yourself, everything here is pre-configured so you can jump straight into training, exploring, and building your team.

Features

⚔️ Wild Trainers – Encounter trainers out in the world who challenge you to battles.
🛠️ Economy & Jobs – Earn rewards through jobs, trading, and auctions.
🏡 Survival Gameplay – Gather resources, build, and survive in a fully featured world.
📦 Quality-of-Life Mods – Enjoy GUIs for shops, daily rewards, Wonder Trade, RPG skills, and more.
🌍 Balanced Adventure – All features are tuned for a fair and enjoyable experience without overcomplication.

Why Use This Pack?

Easy setup – Download once and you’re ready to play; no need to assemble mods manually.

Optimized experience – Carefully chosen mods for smooth gameplay without unnecessary extras.

Community-ready – Whether you’re playing solo or with friends, the pack is designed for fun from the first login.
